title: The Fighting Sullivans
writer: Mary C. McCall Jr., Jules Schermer, Edward Doherty
actors: Anne Baxter, Thomas Mitchell, Selena Royle
plot: The lives of a close-knit group of five brothers growing up in Iowa during the days of the Great Depression, leading to them joining the US Navy and meeting their destiny on the USS Juneau in 1942 during WWII.
